overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city plaza at night in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves past concrete security barriers toward a building with prominent teal neon lighting and circular digital billboards, then continues along the pedestrian street past various NPCs. The scene features wet reflective pavement and dense futuristic urban architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the neon-lit building ahead

entered.detail: striped concrete security barriers blocking vehicle access to the plaza
large circular screen displaying advertisements atop the building
futuristic building with prominent teal neon strip lighting and curved architecture

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open plaza with concrete security barriers toward a futuristic building illuminated by intense teal neon lights. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon glow, and sparse pedestrians are visible in the distance near the building entrance.

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved building front, passing pedestrians gathered near the entrance

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket standing near the building entrance facing the camera

entered.detail: large potted palm trees in red planters lining the building entrance
pink and purple neon light strips along the metal railings

segments.scene_description: Moving along the covered walkway beneath the building's overhang, surrounded by intense teal neon lighting and glowing pink railings. Palm trees in red planters line the path as the camera approaches a moderate crowd of pedestrians near the building entrance, curving left around the structure.

events.description: exiting the covered neon-lit building area into the open street beyond

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the building, moving into a less illuminated area with scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and dark shorts walking in the same direction on the left side

entered.detail: illuminated shop windows and digital displays lining the left side of the street
circular overhead street lamps illuminating the path ahead

segments.scene_description: Passing the building entrance and emerging into the open street beyond, leaving the intense neon lighting behind. Storefront displays with warm lighting line the left side while overhead street lamps illuminate the path ahead, with scattered pedestrians walking along the sidewalks in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-drenched plaza into the sheltered corridors of a futuristic building before emerging onto a dimly lit city street. It begins by gliding past concrete security barriers across wet pavement that reflects an intense teal glow emanating from a nearby structure. As the camera moves beneath the building's overhang, the environment shifts into a vibrant tunnel of teal lights and glowing pink railings lined with palm trees in red planters. The scene then curves left around the structure and passes a crowd of pedestrians at the entrance, gradually leaving the saturated neon behind. Finally, the camera emerges into the open street, where the lighting transitions from electric hues to the warm glow of storefront displays and overhead street lamps.
